title: An Act to Require the Valuation of Energy Produced by Hydropower Dams and Exploration of Alternative Ownership Options Before They Are Removed
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Apr 24, 2025
last_house_action: 3/21/2025 - Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
last_senate_action: 4/24/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Received by the Clerk of the House on January 16, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on ENERGY, UTILITIES AND TECHNOLOGY pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.

Report of the Chair-Pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 Representative SACHS from the Committee on ENERGY, UTILITIES AND TECHNOLOGY Reports a recommendation for a CHANGE OF COMMITEE . Report was READ and ACCEPTED . On motion of Representative SACHS, the Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES . Sent for concurrence.
Report READ and ACCEPTED REFERRED to the Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES in concurrence
Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
